project_type: Static HTML page - academic course work document
test_command: unset NODE_OPTIONS && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8'); const pages=html.match(/class=\"page\"/g); console.log('Pages:', pages?pages.length:0); console.log('Size:', (html.length/1024).toFixed(0)+'KB');"
verification_instructions: 1. Count page divs (should be ~70). 2. Check file size is substantial (>200KB). 3. Verify SVG diagrams exist. 4. Verify print CSS rules exist.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - just write the HTML file
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external dependencies allowed. All content must be inline in the HTML file. No CDN links. No external fonts. No images (use SVG inline instead).
contribution_requirements: File must be committed to git after creation
key_patterns: Single index.html file with embedded CSS and SVG. A4 page layout with page-break-after for print. Times New Roman font, 16px, line-height 1.5. Academic Uzbek language content.
directory_structure: Simple single-file project: /projects/sandbox/claude-ai/index.html is the only output file
